Trouble shooting steps：
1.the connectivity issues;-the customer do not familiar with the model’s
connectivity, this model is 3 in 1 2.4GHZ wireless Game controller and
keyboard,touchpad combo,please install as below steps:1.take out of the receiver
from the accessories box;2.plug the USB receiver into your device’s USB
port;then turn on this model;

side is the game mode,push mode switch to the left side is the keyboard mode;we

1.press the ESC button and turn on the keyboard at the same time ,then release

2.plug in the USB dongle ,the flashing white LED will become solid on once
paired with success within 60 seconds, if it fails for the first time ,you can
repeat step1-2 again,please make sure the keyboard is fully charged before pairing.
